tools.name: keys.apikeysKeysLookupKey
tools.description: Find the parent project and resource name of the API key that matches the key string in the request. If the API key has been purged, resource name will not be set. The service account must have the `apikeys.keys.lookup` permission on the parent project.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysCreate
tools.description: Creates a new API key. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysDelete
tools.description: Deletes an API key. Deleted key can be retrieved within 30 days of deletion. Afterward, key will be purged from the project. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysGet
tools.description: Gets the metadata for an API key. The key string of the API key isn't included in the response. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysGetKeyString
tools.description: Get the key string for an API key. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysList
tools.description: Lists the API keys owned by a project. The key string of the API key isn't included in the response. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysPatch
tools.description: Patches the modifiable fields of an API key. The key string of the API key isn't included in the response. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.apikeysProjectsLocationsKeysUndelete
tools.description: Undeletes an API key which was deleted within 30 days. NOTE: Key is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
